Claude Code running via NVIDIA NIM, completely free

Feature
Description

Zero Cost
40 req/min free on NVIDIA NIM. Free models on OpenRouter. Fully local with LM Studio, Ollama, or llama.cpp

Drop-in Replacement
Set 2 env vars. No modifications to Claude Code CLI or VSCode extension needed

6 Providers
NVIDIA NIM, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, LM Studio (local), llama.cpp (llama-server), Ollama

Per-Model Mapping
Route Opus / Sonnet / Haiku to different models and providers. Mix providers freely

Thinking Token Support
Parses <think> tags and reasoning_content into native Claude thinking blocks

Heuristic Tool Parser
Models outputting tool calls as text are auto-parsed into structured tool use

Request Optimization
5 categories of trivial API calls intercepted locally, saving quota and latency

Smart Rate Limiting
Proactive rolling-window throttle + reactive 429 exponential backoff + optional concurrency cap

Discord / Telegram Bot
Remote autonomous coding with tree-based threading, session persistence, and live progress

Subagent Control
Task tool interception forces run_in_background=False. No runaway subagents

Extensible
Clean BaseProvider and MessagingPlatform ABCs. Add new providers or platforms easily

- Get an API key (or use a local provider):

NVIDIA NIM: [build.nvidia.com/settings/api-keys](https://build.nvidia.com/settings/api-keys)

- OpenRouter: [openrouter.ai/keys](https://openrouter.ai/keys)

- DeepSeek: [platform.deepseek.com/api_keys](https://platform.deepseek.com/api_keys)

- LM Studio: No API key needed. Run locally with [LM Studio](https://lmstudio.ai)

- llama.cpp: No API key needed. Run llama-server locally.

- Ollama: No API key needed. Run locally with [Ollama](https://ollama.com) (ollama serve).

- Install [Claude Code](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code)

# Recommended installer (works on macOS/Linux without relying on system pip)
curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh

# Keep uv current if it is already installed
uv self update

# This project requires Python 3.14
uv python install 3.14

PowerShell (Windows):

# Recommended installer (avoids relying on system pip)
powershell -ExecutionPolicy ByPass -c "irm https://astral.sh/uv/install.ps1 | iex"

# Keep uv current if it is already installed
uv self update

# This project requires Python 3.14
uv python install 3.14

pip install uv can fail on Homebrew-managed Python with externally-managed-environment (PEP 668), so prefer the official installer above.

git clone https://github.com/Alishahryar1/free-claude-code.git
cd free-claude-code
cp .env.example .env

Choose your provider and edit .env:

NVIDIA NIM (40 req/min free, recommended)
NVIDIA_NIM_API_KEY="nvapi-your-key-here"

MODEL_OPUS=
MODEL_SONNET=
MODEL_HAIKU=
MODEL="nvidia_nim/z-ai/glm4.7" # fallback

# Per-Claude-model switches for provider reasoning requests and Claude thinking blocks.
# Blank per-model switches inherit ENABLE_MODEL_THINKING.
ENABLE_OPUS_THINKING=
ENABLE_SONNET_THINKING=
ENABLE_HAIKU_THINKING=
ENABLE_MODEL_THINKING=true

OpenRouter (hundreds of models)
OPENROUTER_API_KEY="sk-or-your-key-here"

MODEL_OPUS="open_router/deepseek/deepseek-r1-0528:free"
MODEL_SONNET="open_router/openai/gpt-oss-120b:free"
MODEL_HAIKU="open_router/stepfun/step-3.5-flash:free"
MODEL="open_router/stepfun/step-3.5-flash:free" # fallback

DeepSeek (direct API)
DEEPSEEK_API_KEY="your-deepseek-key-here"

MODEL_OPUS="deepseek/deepseek-reasoner"
MODEL_SONNET="deepseek/deepseek-chat"
MODEL_HAIKU="deepseek/deepseek-chat"
MODEL="deepseek/deepseek-chat" # fallback

LM Studio (fully local, no API key)
MODEL_OPUS="lmstudio/unsloth/MiniMax-M2.5-GGUF"
MODEL_SONNET="lmstudio/unsloth/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-GGUF"
MODEL_HAIKU="lmstudio/unsloth/GLM-4.7-Flash-GGUF"
MODEL="lmstudio/unsloth/GLM-4.7-Flash-GGUF" # fallback

llama.cpp (fully local, no API key)
LLAMACPP_BASE_URL="http://localhost:8080/v1"

MODEL_OPUS="llamacpp/local-model"
MODEL_SONNET="llamacpp/local-model"
MODEL_HAIKU="llamacpp/local-model"
MODEL="llamacpp/local-model"

Ollama (fully local, no API key)
OLLAMA_BASE_URL="http://localhost:11434"

MODEL_OPUS="ollama/llama3.1"
MODEL_SONNET="ollama/llama3.1"
MODEL_HAIKU="ollama/llama3.1"
MODE
<<<END_EXTERNAL_UNTRUSTED_CONTENT id="b842f7e6eec0d9fe">>>"

Penpot is the open-source design platform for teams that build digital products at scale.

Penpot’s key strength lies in giving you full ownership of your design infrastructure. Built on open source and designed for [self-hosting](https://help.penpot.app/technical-guide/getting-started/), it puts teams in complete control of their design environment supporting strict compliance and governance requirements. Whether used in the browser or deployed on your own servers, Penpot works with open standards like SVG, CSS, HTML, and JSON.

Real-time collaboration strengthens this foundation, helping teams scale and bring design closer to the product through top-tier capabilities. Additionally, developers feel at home using Penpot, because design is expressed as code, enabling a direct translation and shipping products faster.

🎉 TradingAgents officially released! We have received numerous inquiries about the work, and we would like to express our thanks for the enthusiasm in our community.

So we decided to fully open-source the framework. Looking forward to building impactful projects with you!

🚀 [TradingAgents](#tradingagents-framework) | ⚡ [Installation & CLI](#installation-and-cli) | 🎬 [Demo](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=90gr5lwjIho) | 📦 [Package Usage](#tradingagents-package) | 🤝 [Contributing](#contributing) | 📄 [Citation](#citation)

TradingAgents is a multi-agent trading framework that mirrors the dynamics of real-world trading firms. By deploying specialized LLM-powered agents: from fundamental analysts, sentiment experts, and technical analysts, to trader, risk management team, the platform collaboratively evaluates market conditions and informs trading decisions. Moreover, these agents engage in dynamic discussions to pinpoint the optimal strategy.

 /TauricResearch/TradingAgents/blob/main/assets/schema.png

TradingAgents framework is designed for research purposes. Trading performance may vary based on many factors, including the chosen backbone language models, model temperature, trading periods, the quality of data, and other non-deterministic factors. [It is not intended as financial, investment, or trading advice.](https://tauric.ai/disclaimer/)

Our framework decomposes complex trading tasks into specialized roles. This ensures the system achieves a robust, scalable approach to market analysis and decision-making.

- Fundamentals Analyst: Evaluates company financials and performance metrics, identifying intrinsic values and potential red flags.

- Sentiment Analyst: Analyzes social media and public sentiment using sentiment scoring algorithms to gauge short-term market mood.

- News Analyst: Monitors global news and macroeconomic indicators, interpreting the impact of events on market conditions.

- Technical Analyst: Utilizes technical indicators (like MACD and RSI) to detect trading patterns and forecast price movements.

 /TauricResearch/TradingAgents/blob/main/assets/analyst.png

- Comprises both bullish and bearish researchers who critically assess the insights provided by the Analyst Team. Through structured debates, they balance potential gains against inherent risks.

2026-03-06: 🚀 VibeVoice ASR is now part of a [Transformers release](https://huggingface.co/microsoft/VibeVoice-ASR-HF)! You can now use our speech recognition model directly through the Hugging Face Transformers library for seamless integration into your projects.

2026-01-21: 📣 We open-sourced [VibeVoice-ASR](/microsoft/VibeVoice/blob/main/docs/vibevoice-asr.md), a unified speech-to-text model designed to handle 60-minute long-form audio in a single pass, generating structured transcriptions containing Who (Speaker), When (Timestamps), and What (Content), with support for User-Customized Context. Try it in [Playground](https://aka.ms/vibevoice-asr).

- ⭐️ VibeVoice-ASR is natively multilingual, supporting over 50 languages — check the [supported languages](/microsoft/VibeVoice/blob/main/docs/vibevoice-asr.md#language-distribution) for details.

- 🔥 The VibeVoice-ASR [finetuning code](/microsoft/VibeVoice/blob/main/finetuning-asr/README.md) is now available!

- ⚡️ vLLM inference is now supported for faster inference; see [vllm-asr](/microsoft/VibeVoice/blob/main/docs/vibevoice-vllm-asr.md) for more details.

- 📑 [VibeVoice-ASR Technique Report](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2601.18184) is available.

2025-12-16: 📣 We added experimental speakers to [VibeVoice‑Realtime‑0.5B](/microsoft/VibeVoice/blob/main/docs/vibevoice-realtime-0.5b.md) for exploration, including multilingual voices in nine languages (DE, FR, IT, JP, KR, NL, PL, PT, ES) and 11 distinct English style voices. [Try it](/microsoft/VibeVoice/blob/main/docs/vibevoice-realtime-0.5b.md#optional-more-experimental-voices). More speaker types will be added over time.

2025-12-03: 📣 We open-sourced [VibeVoice‑Realtime‑0.5B](/microsoft/VibeVoice/blob/main/docs/vibevoice-realtime-0.5b.md), a real‑time text‑to‑speech model that supports streaming text input and robust long-form speech generation. Try it on [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/microsoft/VibeVoice/blob/main/demo/vibevoice_realtime_colab.ipynb).

2025-09-05: VibeVoice is an open-source research framework intended to advance collaboration in the speech synthesis community. After release, we discovered instances where the tool was used in ways inconsistent with the stated intent. Since responsible use of AI is one of Microsoft’s guiding principles, we have removed the VibeVoice-TTS code from this repository.

2025-08-25: 📣 We open-sourced [VibeVoice-TTS](/microsoft/VibeVoice/blob/main/docs/vibevoice-tts.md), a long-form multi-speaker text-to-speech model that can synthesize speech up to 90 minutes long with up to 4 distinct speakers. — accepted as an [Oral](https://openreview.net/forum?id=FihSkzyxdv) at ICLR 2026! 🔥

VibeVoice is a family of open-source frontier voice AI models that includes both Text-to-Speech (TTS) and Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) models.

A core innovation of VibeVoice is its use of continuous speech tokenizers (Acoustic and Semantic) operating at an ultra-low frame rate of 7.5 Hz. These tokenizers efficiently preserve audio fidelity while significantly boosting computational efficiency for processing long sequences. VibeVoice employs a [next-token diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.08635) framework, leveraging a Large Language Model (LLM) to understand textual context and dialogue flow, and a diffusion head to generate high-fidelity acoustic details.

For more information, demos, and examples, please visit our [Project Page](https://microsoft.github.io/VibeVoice).

Distributed graph issue tracker for AI agents, powered by [Dolt](https://github.com/dolthub/dolt).

Platforms: macOS, Linux, Windows, FreeBSD

/gastownhall/beads/blob/main/LICENSE
https://goreportcard.com/report/github.com/steveyegge/beads
https://github.com/gastownhall/beads/releases
https://www.npmjs.com/package/@beads/bd
https://pypi.org/project/beads-mcp/

Docs: [https://gastownhall.github.io/beads/](https://gastownhall.github.io/beads/)

Beads provides a persistent, structured memory for coding agents. It replaces messy markdown plans with a dependency-aware graph, allowing agents to handle long-horizon tasks without losing context.

> AGENTS.md"># Install beads CLI (system-wide - don't clone this repo into your project)
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gastownhall/beads/main/scripts/install.sh | bash

# Initialize in YOUR project
cd your-project
bd init

# Tell your agent
echo "Use 'bd' for task tracking" >> AGENTS.md

Note: Beads is a CLI tool you install once and use everywhere. You don't need to clone this repository into your project.

- [Dolt](https://github.com/dolthub/dolt)-Powered: Version-controlled SQL database with cell-level merge, native branching, and built-in sync via Dolt remotes.

- Agent-Optimized: JSON output, dependency tracking, and auto-ready task detection.

- Zero Conflict: Hash-based IDs (bd-a1b2) prevent merge collisions in multi-agent/multi-branch workflows.

- Compaction: Semantic "memory decay" summarizes old closed tasks to save context window.

- Messaging: Message issue type with threading (--thread), ephemeral lifecycle, and mail delegation.

- Graph Links: relates_to, duplicates, supersedes, and replies_to for knowledge graphs.

Command
Action

bd ready
List tasks with no open blockers.

bd create "Title" -p 0
Create a P0 task.

bd update <id> --claim
Atomically claim a task (sets assignee + in_progress).

bd dep add <child> <parent>
Link tasks (blocks, related, parent-child).

bd show <id>
View task details and audit trail.

Beads supports hierarchical IDs for epics:

- bd-a3f8 (Epic)

- bd-a3f8.1 (Task)

- bd-a3f8.1.1 (Sub-task)

Stealth Mode: Run bd init --stealth to use Beads locally without committing files to the main repo. Perfect for personal use on shared projects. See [Git-Free Usage](#-git-free-usage) below.

Contributor vs Maintainer: When working on open-source projects:

- Contributors (forked repos): Run bd init --contributor to route planning issues to a separate repo (e.g., ~/.beads-planning). Keeps experimental work out of PRs.

- Maintainers (write access): Beads auto-detects maintainer role via SSH URLs or HTTPS with credentials. Only need git config beads.role maintainer if using GitHub HTTPS without credentials but you have write access.

brew install beads # macOS / Linux (recommended)
npm install -g @beads/bd # Node.js users

Other methods: [install script](/gastownhall/beads/blob/main/docs/INSTALLING.md#quick-install-script-all-platforms) | [go install](/gastownhall/beads/blob/main/docs/INSTALLING.md#a-note-on-go-install-capability) | [from source](/gastownhall/beads/blob/main/docs/INSTALLING.md#build-dependencies-contributors-only) | [Windows](/gastownhall/beads/blob/main/docs/INSTALLING.md#windows-11) | [Arch AUR](/gastownhall/beads/blob/main/docs/INSTALLING.md#linux)

Requirements: macOS, Linux, Windows, or FreeBSD. See [docs/INSTALLING.md](/gastownhall/beads/blob/main/docs/INSTALLING.md) for complete installation guide.

Before trusting any downloaded binary, verify its checksum against the release checksums.txt.

The install scripts verify release checksums before install. For manual installs, do this verification yourself before first run.

On macOS, scripts/install.sh preserves the downloaded signature by default. Local ad-hoc re-signing is explicit opt-in via BEADS_INSTALL_RESIGN_MACOS=1.

See [docs/ANTIVIRUS.md](/gastownhall/beads/blob/main/docs/ANTIVIRUS.md) for Windows AV false-positive guidance and verification workflow.

Beads uses [Dolt](https://github.com/dolthub/dolt) as its database. Two modes
are available:

bd init

Dolt runs in-process — no external server needed. Data lives in
.beads/embeddeddolt/. Single-writer only (file locking enforced).

- [Introduction](#1-introduction)

- [Model Summary](#2-model-summary)

- [Model Downloads](#3-model-downloads)

- [Evaluation Results](#4-evaluation-results)

- [Chat Website & API Platform](#5-chat-website--api-platform)

- [How to Run Locally](#6-how-to-run-locally)

- [License](#7-license)

- [Citation](#8-citation)

- [Contact](#9-contact)

We present DeepSeek-V3, a strong Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language model with 671B total parameters with 37B activated for each token.
To achieve efficient inference and cost-effective training, DeepSeek-V3 adopts Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA) and DeepSeekMoE architectures, which were thoroughly validated in DeepSeek-V2.
Furthermore, DeepSeek-V3 pioneers an auxiliary-loss-free strategy for load balancing and sets a multi-token prediction training objective for stronger performance.
We pre-train DeepSeek-V3 on 14.8 trillion diverse and high-quality tokens, followed by Supervised Fine-Tuning and Reinforcement Learning stages to fully harness its capabilities.
Comprehensive evaluations reveal that DeepSeek-V3 outperforms other open-source models and achieves performance comparable to leading closed-source models.
Despite its excellent performance, DeepSeek-V3 requires only 2.788M H800 GPU hours for its full training.
In addition, its training process is remarkably stable.
Throughout the entire training process, we did not experience any irrecoverable loss spikes or perform any rollbacks.

 /deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3/blob/main/figures/benchmark.png

Architecture: Innovative Load Balancing Strategy and Training Objective

- On top of the efficient architecture of DeepSeek-V2, we pioneer an auxiliary-loss-free strategy for load balancing, which minimizes the performance degradation that arises from encouraging load balancing.

- We investigate a Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) objective and prove it beneficial to model performance.
It can also be used for speculative decoding for inference acceleration.

Pre-Training: Towards Ultimate Training Efficiency

- We design an FP8 mixed precision training framework and, for the first time, validate the feasibility and effectiveness of FP8 training on an extremely large-scale model.

- Through co-design of algorithms, frameworks, and hardware, we overcome the communication bottleneck in cross-node MoE training, nearly achieving full computation-communication overlap.
This significantly enhances our training efficiency and reduces the training costs, enabling us to further scale up the model size without additional overhead.

- At an economical cost of only 2.664M H800 GPU hours, we complete the pre-training of DeepSeek-V3 on 14.8T tokens, producing the currently strongest open-source base model. The subsequent training stages after pre-training require only 0.1M GPU hours.

Post-Training: Knowledge Distillation from DeepSeek-R1

- We introduce an innovative methodology to distill reasoning capabilities from the long-Chain-of-Thought (CoT) model, specifically from one of the DeepSeek R1 series models, into standard LLMs, particularly DeepSeek-V3. Our pipeline elegantly incorporates the verification and reflection patterns of R1 into DeepSeek-V3 and notably improves its reasoning performance. Meanwhile, we also maintain a control over the output style and length of DeepSeek-V3.

Learn how to design large-scale systems.

Prep for the system design interview.

Learning how to design scalable systems will help you become a better engineer.

System design is a broad topic. There are a vast number of resources scattered throughout the web on system design principles.

This repo is an organized collection of resources to help you learn how to build systems at scale.

This is a continually updated, open source project.

[Contributions](#contributing) are welcome!

In addition to coding interviews, system design is a required component of the technical interview process at many tech companies.

Practice common system design interview questions and compare your results with sample solutions: discussions, code, and diagrams.

# feishu_wiki_write

将 Markdown 内容写入飞书知识库。根据文件名和内容关键词分析，自动选择最合适的文档目录下创建子文档。

## 目标知识库

- **名称**: AI 知识库  
- **Space ID**: 7615846908665285857
- **URL**: https://my.feishu.cn/wiki/settings/7615846908665285857

## 参数

### filename（可选）
文件名（不含扩展名）。用于：
1. 作为文档标题
2. 分析文件类型和分类

### content（必填）
Markdown 内容，要写入文档的内容。使用 Lark-flavored Markdown 格式。

## 工作流程

1. 在知识库根目录创建新文档
2. 写入 Markdown 内容
3. 返回文档链接

## 当前状态

⚠️ **权限待添加**：应用需要以下权限才能读写知识库：
- `wiki:space:readonly` - 读取知识库
- `wiki:node:create` - 创建知识库文档  
- `wiki:node:update` - 更新知识库文档

## 返回值

- **doc_url**: 文档访问链接
- **doc_id**: 文档 ID  
- **node_token**: 知识库节点 token

## 示例

```json
{
  "filename": "API设计规范",
  "content": "# API 设计规范\n\n## 概述\n\n本文档定义了 REST API 的设计标准。"
}
```

## 注意事项

- 知识库 space_id: `7615846908665285857`
- 需要在飞书开放平台开通 `wiki:space:readonly` 和 `wiki:node:create` 权限

# GitHub Trending 日榜深度调研

> 📅 调研日期：2026年4月27日（UTC）  
> 🔍 数据来源：github.com/trending  
> 🤖 调研框架：MiniMax-M2.5-HighSpeed  
> ⚠️ 声明：本调研仅供参考学习，不构成任何投资或使用建议。

---

## 📊 今日概览

今日 GitHub Trending 榜单整体呈现 **"AI 编程助手生态爆发"** 的显著特征，共覆盖 13 个项目，涵盖 AI Agent 开发框架、代码智能、知识图谱、语音 AI、金融交易、设计工具等多个领域。

**核心趋势：**
- 🧠 **AI Coding Agent** 赛道持续火热——mattpock/skills（5,551⭐/天）、free-claude-code（2,973⭐/天）引爆热度
- 🔗 **知识图谱 + Agent 上下文** 成为工程化新方向（GitNexus、Beads）
- 🗣️ **语音 AI** 基础设施逐步成熟（Microsoft VibeVoice）
- 📈 **AI + 垂直领域** 深度融合：金融交易（TradingAgents）、代码智能、代码开发

---

## 🏆 重点项目深度分析

---

### 1. mattpocock/skills

**基本信息**

| 项目 | 信息 |
|------|------|
| 仓库 | [mattpocock/skills](https://github.com/mattpocock/skills) |
| 总 Stars | ⭐ 28,554 |
| 今日 Stars | ⭐ 5,551 |
| 语言 | Shell |
| 构建者 | mattpocock、claude |

**项目概述**

mattpocock/skills 是知名 TypeScript 布道师 Matt Pocock 开源的 AI Agent 技能库，直接来源于他的 `.claude` 配置目录。这不是普通的提示词集合，而是一套经过真实工程实践验证的、结构化的 Agent 开发技能体系。

**核心功能**

项目包含 **16 个独立技能**，分为两类：

**问题思考类（Plan/Spec 导向）**
- `to-prd`：将对话上下文合成 PRD 并提交为 GitHub Issue
- `to-issues`：将计划拆解为独立可领取的 GitHub Issue（纵向切片）
- `grill-me`：对计划或设计进行"连珠炮式"追问，直到所有决策分支被穷举
- `design-an-interface`：通过并行子 Agent 生成多个差异化的接口设计方案
- `request-refactor-plan`：创建重构计划并提交为 GitHub Issue

**代码开发类**
- `tdd`：红-绿-重构循环，测试驱动开发
- `triage-issue`：调查 Bug、定位根因并提出修复方案
- `improve-codebase-architecture`：在现有代码库中寻找架构深化机会
- `setup-pre-commit`：配置 Husky + lint-staged + Prettier + 类型检查
- `git-guardrails-claude-code`：在危险 Git 命令（push/reset --hard/clean）执行前进行拦截

**核心亮点**

1. **真实工程实践**：每个技能都经过 Matt Pocock 日常工程师工作的实际验证，非理论性设计
2. **渐进式披露（Progressive Disclosure）**：技能结构支持按需加载，节省 Agent 上下文窗口
3. **垂直切片思维**：`to-issues` 技能体现了"纵向切片"的工程哲学——每个 Issue 可独立开发、测试、部署
4. **零门槛安装**：`npx skills@latest add mattpocock/skills/xxx` 一键安装

**适用场景**

- 希望规范化 AI Coding Agent 工作流的个人开发者
- 需要构建企业级 AI Coding 规范的团队
- 对 AI Agent 工程化实践感兴趣的研究者

**趋势洞察**

这是 Matt Pocock 继 ts-pattern、total-typescript 之后的又一次"知识开源"尝试。反映出 AI Coding 生态正从"让模型写代码"向"让模型像资深工程师一样思考"的范式升级。预计未来会有更多工程师公开自己的 Agent 技能库，形成类似"工程最佳实践开源"的生态。

**综合评级：⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐**

---

### 2. abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus

**基本信息**

| 项目 | 信息 |
|------|------|
| 仓库 | [abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus](https://github.com/abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus) |
| 总 Stars | ⭐ 31,203 |
| 今日 Stars | ⭐ 1,074 |
| 语言 | TypeScript |
| 构建者 | abhigyanpatwari、magyargergo、claude、naicud、apps/copilot-swe-agent |

**项目概述**

GitNexus 是一个**零服务器的代码智能引擎**，通过知识图谱技术为 AI Coding Agent 构建"神经系统"。其核心思想是：不再依赖 LLM 的涌现能力去"猜"代码关系，而是主动建立精确的依赖图谱、调用链和执行流。

**核心功能**

1. **代码知识图谱构建**：使用 Tree-sitter 解析代码，建立依赖关系、调用链、聚类和执行流的全图谱
2. **CLI + MCP 双模式**：
   - **CLI 模式**：`npx gitnexus analyze` 索引代码库，安装 Agent 技能，注册 Claude Code 钩子，自动生成 AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md
   - **Web UI 模式**：gitnexus.vercel.app 纯浏览器端可视化探索 + AI 对话，无需安装
3. **Bridge 模式**：CLI 服务运行后，Web UI 自动发现并连接，可浏览所有已索引的仓库，无需重新上传
4. **多编辑器支持**：Claude Code（完整支持）、Cursor、Codex、Windsurf、OpenCode
5. **MCP Server**：输出为 MCP 工具格式，Claude Code/Cursor/Codex 等 Agent 可直接调用

**核心亮点**

1. **知识图谱 vs 简单描述**：DeepWiki 提供代码描述，GitNexus 追踪每一个精确关系——这是本质差异
2. **隐私优先**：所有数据本地处理，CLI 模式无网络请求，Web UI 模式数据在浏览器内存中
3. **企业级功能**：PR Review（爆炸半径分析）、自动更新代码 Wiki、多仓库统一图谱
4. **极低门槛**：`npx gitnexus analyze` 一条命令完成所有配置

**适用场景**

- 大型代码库（>1000 文件）的 AI Agent 开发团队
- 需要提升 AI Coding 准确性的开发者
- 对代码架构可视化有需求的技术 Lead

**趋势洞察**

GitNexus 代表了 AI Coding Agent 的"工程化 2.0"方向——从依赖模型涌现能力，到主动构建结构化知识。其核心创新在于"让 AI Agent 具备架构级上下文感知"，这与 Matt Pocock 的 skills 形成了互补：skills 解决"如何思考"，GitNexus 解决"知道什么"。

**综合评级：⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐**

---

### 3. Alishahryar1/free-claude-code

**基本信息**

| 项目 | 信息 |
|------|------|
| 仓库 | [Alishahryar1/free-claude-code](https://github.com/Alishahryar1/free-claude-code) |
| 总 Stars | ⭐ 15,695 |
| 今日 Stars | ⭐ 2,973 |
| 语言 | Python |
| 构建者 | Alishahryar1、cursoragent、claude、rishiskhare、apps/dependabot |

**项目概述**

free-claude-code 是一个让用户**免费使用 Claude Code CLI、VSCode 扩展或 Discord/Telegram 机器人**的中间层代理项目。支持 NVIDIA NIM、OpenRouter、DeepSeek、LM Studio（本地）、llama.cpp（本地）、Ollama（本地）六大提供商。

**核心功能**

1. **零成本**：NVIDIA NIM 40 req/min 完全免费；OpenRouter/DeepSeek 提供免费额度；LM Studio/llama.cpp/Ollama 完全本地无需 API Key
2. **透明替换**：只需设置 2 个环境变量，无需修改 Claude Code CLI 或 VSCode 扩展本身
3. **per-model 路由**：可将 Opus/Sonnet/Haiku 映射到不同模型和提供商，自由混合
4. **思考 Token 支持**：解析 `<think>` 标签和 reasoning_content，转换为原生 Claude thinking blocks
5. **启发式工具解析**：将模型输出的文本格式工具调用自动解析为结构化工具调用
6. **请求优化**：5 类常见 API 调用本地拦截，节省配额和延迟
7. **智能限流**：滚动窗口主动限流 + 429 指数退避 + 可选并发上限
8. **Discord/Telegram 机器人**：远程自主编程，支持基于线程的会话持久化

**核心亮点**

1. **真正零成本**：NVIDIA NIM 的免费层让任何人无需付费即可使用 Claude Code 核心能力
2. **完全本地**：LM Studio/llama.cpp/Ollama 支持让隐私敏感场景也能使用 Claude Code 架构
3. **多提供商灵活切换**：DeepSeek 便宜、OpenRouter 丰富、本地完全免费，按需切换
4. **工具调用透明化**：即使是输出工具调用文本的模型，也能被自动桥接

**适用场景**

- 预算有限的个人开发者或小团队
- 对数据隐私有要求、无法将代码发送到第三方的场景
- 想体验 Claude Code 架构但不想付费的用户

**趋势洞察**

这是 Claude Code 生态的"第三方赋能"项目，反映出 Claude Code 的架构（工具调用 + Agent Loop）已经被视为可复用的范式。其核心价值是"绕过 Anthropic 的商业化限制"，预计会引发关于 API 路由工具的更广泛讨论。

**综合评级：⭐⭐⭐⭐**

### 4. ComposioHQ/awesome-codex-skills

**基本信息**

| 项目 | 信息 |

**项目概述**

awesome-codex-skills 是 Composio 维护的 Codex CLI 技能精选列表，涵盖开发工具、生产力、通信、数据分析等多个领域的即用型技能。

**核心功能**

Codex 技能是模块化的指令包，每个技能包含元数据（名称 + 描述）和分步指导。Codex 根据元数据决定何时触发技能，仅在实际使用时加载完整内容，保持上下文精简。

### 5. gastownhall/beads

**基本信息**

| 平台 | macOS, Linux, Windows, FreeBSD |

**项目概述**

Beads 是一个为 AI Coding Agent 提供**持久化、结构化记忆**的工具，用依赖感知的图谱替代杂乱的 Markdown 计划，让 Agent 能够处理长周期任务而不丢失上下文。

**核心功能**

1. **Dolt 驱动的版本控制**：使用 Dolt（版本控制 SQL 数据库）存储，支持 cell 级合并、原生分支和 Dolt remote 同步
2. **依赖感知图谱**：任务之间可建立 blocks/related/parent-child 等多种关系
3. **零冲突**：基于哈希的 ID（bd-a1b2）防止多 Agent/多分支工作流中的合并冲突
4. **语义压缩**：语义"记忆衰减"——自动将旧的已完成任务汇总，节省上下文窗口
5. **消息类型**：支持线程（--thread）、临时生命周期和邮件委托
6. **图谱链接**：relates_to、duplicates、supersedes、replies_to 支持知识图谱构建
7. **隐形模式（Stealth Mode）**：`bd init --stealth` 本地使用，不向主仓库提交任何文件

**核心亮点**

1. **与 Matt Pocock skills 的完美互补**：skills 教 Agent"如何思考"，Beads 教 Agent"记住什么"
2. **Dolt 的创新应用**：Dolt 的版本控制能力在这里找到了完美的应用场景——任务历史即 SQL 历史
3. **Agent 优化的输出**：JSON 输出、依赖追踪、自动就绪任务检测
4. **多平台支持**：macOS/Linux/Windows/FreeBSD 全平台支持

**适用场景**

- 需要管理复杂多步骤项目的 AI Coding Agent 用户
- 多 Agent 协作开发环境
- 开源项目贡献者（--contributor 模式）

**趋势洞察**

Beads + GitNexus + mattpocock/skills 构成了一个 AI Coding Agent 的"记忆-知识-方法"三层体系。这三者在同一天上榜并非偶然，反映出 AI Coding 生态正在从"单个 Agent"向"Agent + 工具链"演进。

**综合评级：⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐**

Penpot 是今日榜单中唯一的"传统软件"项目，但其 MCP Server 的推出标志着 AI 正在渗透到创意工具领域。设计工具的 AI 化（AI 理解设计 → AI 生成代码）是一个值得关注的新趋势。

**项目概述**

VibeVoice 是微软开源的前沿语音 AI 模型家族，包含语音识别（ASR）和语音合成（TTS）两个方向。其中 TTS 代码已于 2025 年 9 月因滥用风险从仓库移除，但 ASR 和 Realtime TTS 仍保持开源。

**核心模型**

| 模型 | 参数量 | 核心能力 |
|------|--------|---------|
| VibeVoice-ASR-7B | 7B | 60分钟长音频单遍处理，50+语言，结构化转录（谁/何时/何内容） |
| VibeVoice-TTS-1.5B | 1.5B | 90分钟长语音生成，最多4个不同说话者，ICLR 2026 Oral |
| VibeVoice-Realtime-0.5B | 0.5B | 实时流式 TTS，支持流式文本输入 |

**核心技术创新**

1. **超低帧率声学 Tokenizer**：7.5 Hz（业界领先）同时保持高音频保真度
2. **Next-Token Diffusion**：结合 LLM 理解文本上下文 + Diffusion Head 生成高保真声学细节
3. **60分钟单遍 ASR**：业界领先的长音频处理能力，无需分段
4. **Hugging Face Transformers 原生支持**：VibeVoice-ASR 已集成进 Transformers 库，一行代码调用

**趋势洞察**

微软 VibeVoice 代表了大厂在语音 AI 基础设施上的开源竞争。其 7.5 Hz 超低帧率 tokenizer 和 next-token diffusion 框架是技术创新点。ASR 方向开源对 Whisper 构成挑战，Realtime-0.5B 的小体积对边缘部署友好。

**综合评级：⭐⭐⭐⭐**

**项目概述**

TradingAgents 是一个多 Agent LLM 金融交易框架，模拟真实交易公司的运作模式，通过多角色 LLM Agent 协作评估市场状况并给出交易决策。

**架构设计**

框架包含 5 类专业 Agent：

1. **基础分析师（Fundamentals Analyst）**：评估公司财务和业绩指标，识别内在价值和潜在风险
2. **情绪分析师（Sentiment Analyst）**：分析社交媒体和公众情绪，使用情绪评分算法判断短期市场情绪
3. **新闻分析师（News Analyst）**：监控全球新闻和宏观经济指标，解读事件对市场的影响
4. **技术分析师（Technical Analyst）**：使用 MACD、RSI 等技术指标检测交易模式
5. **研究员（Researchers）**：多空双方研究者，通过结构化辩论平衡潜在收益和固有风险

最终由 **交易员（Trader）** 整合分析师报告，决定交易时机和规模；**风险管理团队** 持续评估组合风险；**投资组合经理** 做最终决策。

**v0.2.4 最新特性**

- 结构化输出 Agent（Research Manager、Trader、Portfolio Manager）
- LangGraph checkpoint resume
- 持久化决策日志
- DeepSeek/Qwen/GLM/Azure 多提供商支持
- Docker 部署支持
- Windows UTF-8 编码修复

**⚠️ 重要声明**

> 框架仅供研究目的。交易表现因所选骨干模型、模型温度、交易周期、数据质量和其他非确定性因素而异。**不构成任何金融、投资或交易建议。**

**趋势洞察**

TradingAgents 体现了 LLM Agent 在垂直领域（金融）的深度应用。多 Agent 辩论机制是亮点——通过模拟买卖双方的对抗性讨论，减少单 Agent 的认知偏差。结合 DeepSeek/Qwen 等国产模型的支持，反映出国产 LLM 在专业领域应用的探索。

**项目概述**

ds2api 是一个轻量级、高性能的全栈中间件，将 DeepSeek Web 对话能力转换为 OpenAI、Claude 与 Gemini 兼容 API。后端使用 Go，前端为 React WebUI 管理控制台。

**核心架构**

```
客户端 (OpenAI/Claude/Gemini SDK)
    ↓
Router (chi + 中间件: RequestID/RealIP/Logger/CORS)
    ↓
兼容层 (PromptCompat: API → 网页纯文本上下文)
    ↓
Chat Runtime (统一工具调用 + 流式语义)
    ↓
┌─────────────────────────────────┐
│ Auth Resolver（多 API Key 认证）│
│ Account Pool（多账号轮询+队列）  │
│ PoW 实现（纯 Go）               │
│ Tool Sieve（Go/Node 语义对齐）   │
│ DeepSeek Client                 │
└─────────────────────────────────┘
    ↓
DeepSeek API (上游)
```

**核心功能**

1. **多协议兼容**：同时支持 OpenAI `/v1/chat/completions`、Claude `/v1/messages`、Gemini `/v1beta/models/*`
2. **多账号轮询**：Account Pool + Queue，支持并发槽位控制
3. **PoW 反爬**：内置工作量证明，防止滥用
4. **Vercel Serverless + Docker**：多种部署方式
5. **文件上传 + Embeddings**：完整 API 能力
6. **长历史文件化**：超出上下文窗口的历史自动外部存储

**趋势洞察**

ds2api 是"API 路由/代理"赛道的典型项目，解决的是"DeepSeek API 便宜但功能单一 vs OpenAI 功能丰富但贵"的矛盾。其 Go 后端 + React 前端的架构在同类项目中具有较高的工程参考价值。

**模型规格**

| 模型 | 总参数量 | 激活参数量 | 上下文长度 |
|------|---------|-----------|-----------|

| DeepSeek-V3 | 671B | 37B | 128K |

**核心技术创新**

1. **无辅助损失负载均衡（Auxiliary-loss-free Load Balancing）**：首创，无需通过辅助损失函数来平衡专家负载，最小化负载均衡带来的性能损失
2. **多 Token 预测（MTP）训练目标**：每个位置预测多个 token，既提升性能，又可用于推测解码加速推理
3. **FP8 混合精度训练**：首次在超大规模模型上验证 FP8 可行性
4. **训练效率优化**：通过算法、框架、硬件协同设计，解决跨节点 MoE 训练的通信瓶颈，近乎实现完全计算-通信重叠
5. **推理能力蒸馏**：从 DeepSeek R1 系列蒸馏推理能力到标准 LLM

**关键数据**

- **预训练成本**：仅需 2.664M H800 GPU 小时（14.8T tokens）
- **训练稳定性**：全流程无任何不可恢复损失尖峰，无回滚
- **Benchmark 表现**：超越所有开源模型，媲美顶级闭源模型
